news.title: U.S. Strikes Iran. How Oil and Stocks Are Reacting.
news.summary: U.S. forces struck Iranian military targets on Friday after what Washington described as an Iranian drone attack on a commercial ship near the Strait of Hormuz, raising new questions about the durability of a ceasefire in one of the world’s most important shipping corridors.  U.S. Central Command said American aircraft hit Iranian missile and drone storage locations, as well as coastal radar sites, on Friday.  The strikes came after a Singapore-flagged cargo ship was hit near Hormuz on Thursday.
